name: list_partners
description: List all partner institutions (universities, companies, and organizations) that offer courses on Coursera. Returns partner names, descriptions, logos, locations, and the number of courses they offer.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search type. Use 'search' for keyword search.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter partners by name.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include.

elements.name: Stanford University
elements.description: Leland Stanford Junior University, commonly referred to as Stanford University...
